features.name: Trailing Stop Loss
features.description: Dynamic stop loss that moves up as price rises. Triggers sell on X% drop from highest point since entry. Replaces fixed stop loss with adaptive mechanism that protects gains.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/service.py — modify exit logic to track highest price since entry and trigger stop loss relative to that peak instead of entry price

features.name: Trailing Take Profit
features.description: After profit target is hit, trail the price upward to capture more gains. Only sells when price drops X% from peak after reaching profit threshold.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/service.py — add trailing profit mode that activates after take_profit threshold, tracks peak, sells on retracement

features.name: Trailing Buy
features.description: After buy signals confirm, trail the price downward to find local bottom before executing buy. Buys when price rises X% from the trailing low.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/service.py — add trailing buy state that delays entry, tracks lowest price after signal, buys on reversal

features.name: ADX (Average Directional Index)
features.description: Measures trend STRENGTH (not direction). Values: 0-25 weak, 25-50 strong, 50-75 very strong, 75-100 extremely strong. Enhances market regime detection.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/ — add ADX calculation from price bars, integrate into regime detection and recommendation scoring

features.name: Stochastic RSI
features.description: Stochastic oscillator applied to RSI values. More sensitive than plain RSI. Returns %K and %D lines with crossover detection for momentum signals.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/ — add StochRSI calculation, integrate into recommendation scoring composite

features.name: Squeeze Momentum Indicator
features.description: Detects when Bollinger Bands squeeze inside Keltner Channels (low volatility). Predicts imminent breakout. Fires signal when squeeze releases.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/ — add Keltner Channel calculation, detect BB-inside-KC squeeze, add as anomaly detector
features.marketpulse_has: BB exists but no squeeze detection

features.name: Auto Strategy Profile Switch
features.description: Automatically switch between balanced/aggressive/conservative profiles based on detected market regime. Bull market → aggressive, bear → conservative, neutral → balanced.
features.scope: backend/app/strategy/ — add auto_switch logic that connects existing regime detection to existing strategy profiles
features.marketpulse_has: both regime detection and strategy profiles exist, but not connected

features.name: DCA Engine (Dollar Cost Averaging)
features.description: When a position goes into loss, automatically buy more at lower prices to reduce average entry. Configurable: max DCA levels, buy amount per level, trigger percentage per level.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/ — add DCA logic with configurable levels, track average entry price across DCA buys

features.name: VWAP / MVWAP
features.description: Volume-Weighted Average Price — institutional-grade price level. MVWAP is the moving average of VWAP. Shows fair value based on volume distribution.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/ — calculate VWAP from price bars with volume, add as indicator

features.name: OBV (On-Balance Volume)
features.description: Cumulative volume indicator: adds volume on up days, subtracts on down days. Shows buying/selling pressure via volume flow.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/ — add OBV calculation from price bars

features.name: MFI (Money Flow Index)
features.description: Volume-weighted RSI. Combines price and volume to measure buying/selling pressure. 0-100 scale like RSI.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/ — add MFI calculation

features.name: Buy/Sell Slippage Simulation
features.description: Simulate slippage in paper trading: actual fill price = market price +/- configurable slippage %. Makes P&L more realistic.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/service.py — apply slippage offset to entry/exit prices

features.name: Consecutive Stop Loss Protection
features.description: After N consecutive stop losses, automatically pause buying for X minutes. Prevents cascading losses in crash scenarios.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/service.py — track consecutive stop losses, add cooldown mechanism

features.name: Buy Timeout After Sell
features.description: Cooldown period before re-entering a position after selling (especially after a loss). Prevents revenge trading.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/service.py — add per-asset cooldown timer after position close

features.name: Parabolic SAR
features.description: Stop and Reverse indicator. Dots above/below price show trend direction. Natural fit for dynamic stop-loss placement.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/

features.name: CCI (Commodity Channel Index)
features.description: Measures deviation from statistical mean. Values above +100 = overbought, below -100 = oversold.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/

features.name: Keltner Channels
features.description: ATR-based envelope channels. Used with Bollinger Bands for squeeze detection.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/

features.name: Fibonacci Retracement Levels
features.description: Calculate support/resistance at Fibonacci ratios (23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8%) from recent swing high/low.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/

features.name: Pivot Points
features.description: Classic support/resistance pivot calculations from previous period high/low/close.
features.scope: backend/app/indicators/

features.name: Min/Max Buy Volume Filter
features.description: Only allow entries on assets with sufficient trading volume. Prevents bad fills on illiquid assets.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/service.py
